[NWS SEW] Area Forecast Discussion 2026-05-27T21:24 — 000 FXUS66 KSEW 272124 AFDSEW Area Forecast Discussion National Weather Service Seattle WA 224 PM PDT Wed May 27 2026 .SYNOPSIS... Dry weather with a neutral flow pattern over Western Washington will continue today into Thursday. An upper level trough from the Gulf of Alaska will begin to sink down into the region Thursday into Friday, with an upper level low in California pivoting to the northeast, all over a surface trough across Eas
